source_of_truth: Local Supabase Docker container supabase_db_games-library, database postgres, schema games_library

queries.table_counts:
select * from (
  select 1 as sort_order, 'games' as table_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count from games_library.games
  union all select 2, 'game_platforms', count(*)::bigint from games_library.game_platforms
  union all select 3, 'game_tags', count(*)::bigint from games_library.game_tags
  union all select 4, 'game_aliases', count(*)::bigint from games_library.game_aliases
  union all select 5, 'platforms', count(*)::bigint from games_library.platforms
  union all select 6, 'genres', count(*)::bigint from games_library.genres
  union all select 7, 'series', count(*)::bigint from games_library.series
  union all select 8, 'tags', count(*)::bigint from games_library.tags
  union all select 9, 'profiles', count(*)::bigint from games_library.profiles
  union all select 10, 'user_game_states', count(*)::bigint from games_library.user_game_states
  union all select 11, 'rate_limits', count(*)::bigint from games_library.rate_limits
  union all select 12, 'audit_log', count(*)::bigint from games_library.audit_log
  union all select 13, 'api_cache', count(*)::bigint from games_library.api_cache
) t order by sort_order
queries.source_distribution:
select coalesce(source_type, 'unknown') as source_type, count(*)::bigint as row_count
from games_library.games
group by 1
order by row_count desc, source_type
queries.release_state:
select coalesce(release_state, 'unknown') as release_state, count(*)::bigint as row_count
from games_library.games
group by 1
order by row_count desc, release_state
queries.quality_gaps:
with total as (select count(*)::numeric as n from games_library.games)
select * from (
  select 1 as sort_order, 'Missing series' as metric, count(*)::bigint as row_count, round(count(*)::numeric / max(total.n) * 100, 1) as pct_games, 'Often valid for standalone games; review generic contamination separately.' as interpretation
  from games_library.games, total where series_id is null
  union all
  select 2, 'Missing genre', count(*)::bigint, round(count(*)::numeric / max(total.n) * 100, 1), 'Important recommendation/search quality gap.'
  from games_library.games, total where genre_id is null
  union all
  select 3, 'Missing cover', count(*)::bigint, round(count(*)::numeric / max(total.n) * 100, 1), 'Visible product quality gap, not identity.'
  from games_library.games, total where coalesce(cover_url, '') = ''
  union all
  select 4, 'No tags array', count(*)::bigint, round(count(*)::numeric / max(total.n) * 100, 1), 'Can weaken recommendations; validate game_tags too.'
  from games_library.games, total where cardinality(tags) = 0
  union all
  select 5, 'Unknown release year', count(*)::bigint, round(count(*)::numeric / max(total.n) * 100, 1), 'Sentinel year 0; avoid date-based merges until enriched.'
  from games_library.games, total where release_year = 0
) q order by sort_order
queries.duplicate_stats:
with norm as (
  select
    game_id,
    title,
    coalesce(source_type, 'unknown') as source_type,
    source_ref,
    nullif(release_year, 0) as known_year,
    regexp_replace(lower(title), '[^a-z0-9]+', '', 'g') as normalized_title_key
  from games_library.games
), groups as (
  select
    normalized_title_key,
    count(*)::int as row_count,
    count(distinct known_year) as known_year_count,
    count(distinct source_type) as source_type_count
  from norm
  group by normalized_title_key
  having count(*) > 1
)
select
  count(*)::bigint as duplicate_groups,
  sum(row_count)::bigint as affected_rows,
  max(row_count)::int as max_group_size,
  sum(case when known_year_count <= 1 then 1 else 0 end)::bigint as same_or_unknown_year_groups,
  sum(case when known_year_count > 1 then 1 else 0 end)::bigint as different_known_year_groups,
  sum(case when source_type_count > 1 then 1 else 0 end)::bigint as multi_source_groups
from groups
queries.duplicate_examples:
with norm as (
  select
    game_id,
    title,
    coalesce(source_type, 'unknown') as source_type,
    source_ref,
    release_year,
    regexp_replace(lower(title), '[^a-z0-9]+', '', 'g') as normalized_title_key
  from games_library.games
), groups as (
  select normalized_title_key, count(*) as row_count, count(distinct nullif(release_year,0)) as known_year_count
  from norm
  group by normalized_title_key
  having count(*) > 1
)
select
  n.normalized_title_key,
  g.row_count::int,
  g.known_year_count::int,
  jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('game_id', n.game_id, 'title', n.title, 'release_year', n.release_year, 'source_type', n.source_type) order by n.release_year, n.source_type, n.game_id) as rows
from norm n
join groups g using (normalized_title_key)
where n.normalized_title_key in ('darksoulsiii','darksoulsremastered','deadcells','doom','finalfantasyxx2hdremaster','grandtheftautov','dragonquestiiihd2dremake')
group by n.normalized_title_key, g.row_count, g.known_year_count
order by g.row_count desc, n.normalized_title_key
queries.profile_divergence:
select * from (
  select 1 as sort_order, 'profiles' as metric, count(*)::bigint as row_count from games_library.profiles
  union all select 2, 'profiles_with_json_states', count(*)::bigint from games_library.profiles where game_states <> '{}'::jsonb
  union all select 3, 'json_state_entries', count(*)::bigint from games_library.profiles p cross join lateral jsonb_object_keys(p.game_states) k
  union all select 4, 'user_game_states', count(*)::bigint from games_library.user_game_states
) q order by sort_order
queries.series_contamination:
select * from (
  select 'series_equal_genres' as check_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count,
         array_agg(s.name order by s.name) filter (where s.name is not null) as examples
  from games_library.series s
  join games_library.genres g on lower(s.name) = lower(g.name)
  union all
  select 'series_equal_tags' as check_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count,
         array_agg(s.name order by s.name) filter (where s.name is not null) as examples
  from games_library.series s
  join games_library.tags t on lower(s.name) = lower(t.name)
) q
queries.orphan_checks:
select * from (
  select 'game_aliases.game_id' as check_name, count(*)::bigint as orphan_count from games_library.game_aliases a left join games_library.games g using (game_id) where g.game_id is null
  union all select 'game_platforms.game_id', count(*)::bigint from games_library.game_platforms gp left join games_library.games g using (game_id) where g.game_id is null
  union all select 'game_platforms.platform_id', count(*)::bigint from games_library.game_platforms gp left join games_library.platforms p on p.id = gp.platform_id where p.id is null
  union all select 'game_tags.game_id', count(*)::bigint from games_library.game_tags gt left join games_library.games g using (game_id) where g.game_id is null
  union all select 'game_tags.tag_id', count(*)::bigint from games_library.game_tags gt left join games_library.tags t on t.id = gt.tag_id where t.id is null
  union all select 'games.genre_id', count(*)::bigint from games_library.games g left join games_library.genres ge on ge.id = g.genre_id where g.genre_id is not null and ge.id is null
  union all select 'games.series_id', count(*)::bigint from games_library.games g left join games_library.series s on s.id = g.series_id where g.series_id is not null and s.id is null
) q order by check_name
queries.restore_counts:
select * from (
  select 'games_library_restore.games' as table_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count from games_library_restore.games
  union all select 'games_library_restore.platforms', count(*)::bigint from games_library_restore.platforms
  union all select 'games_library_restore.game_platforms', count(*)::bigint from games_library_restore.game_platforms
) q order by table_name
queries.platform_top:
select p.name as platform_name, count(*)::bigint as game_count
from games_library.game_platforms gp
join games_library.platforms p on p.id = gp.platform_id
group by p.name
order by game_count desc, p.name
limit 12

rows.title: Dragon Quest I & II HD-2D Remake

chart_map.claim: Duplicate cleanup is a review workflow, not a source filter.
Metadata gaps are larger than duplicate count and should be cleaned after identity is protected.
source_type is provenance and should not be used as game identity.
